name: target_l3_is_cr3
code:
proof fn phi_1_target_l3_is_cr3(pt: PageTable, target_l4i: L4Index, target_l3_p: PageMapPtr)
    requires
        pt.wf(),
        pt.kernel_l4_end <= target_l4i < 512,
        pt.spec_resolve_mapping_l4(target_l4i).is_Some(),
        pt.spec_resolve_mapping_l4(target_l4i).get_Some_0().addr == target_l3_p,
        forall|i: L3Index| #![auto] 0 <= i < 512 ==> pt.spec_resolve_mapping_l3(target_l4i, i).is_None(),
        forall|i: L3Index| #![auto] 0 <= i < 512 ==> pt.spec_resolve_mapping_1g_l3(target_l4i, i).is_None(),
    ensures
        target_l3_p == pt.cr3,
{
}
reason: If the L4 entry's target address aliases the root cr3 pointer, removing the entry would corrupt the page table root

name: preconditions_vacuous
code:
proof fn phi_2_preconditions_vacuous(pt: PageTable, target_l4i: L4Index, target_l3_p: PageMapPtr)
    requires
        pt.wf(),
        pt.kernel_l4_end <= target_l4i < 512,
        pt.spec_resolve_mapping_l4(target_l4i).is_Some(),
        pt.spec_resolve_mapping_l4(target_l4i).get_Some_0().addr == target_l3_p,
        forall|i: L3Index| #![auto] 0 <= i < 512 ==> pt.spec_resolve_mapping_l3(target_l4i, i).is_None(),
        forall|i: L3Index| #![auto] 0 <= i < 512 ==> pt.spec_resolve_mapping_1g_l3(target_l4i, i).is_None(),
    ensures
        false,
{
}
reason: If the combined preconditions are unsatisfiable, the function is dead code and any postcondition holds vacuously

name: l3_ptr_in_lower_tables
code:
proof fn phi_3_l3_ptr_in_lower_tables(pt: PageTable, target_l4i: L4Index, target_l3_p: PageMapPtr)
    requires
        pt.wf(),
        pt.kernel_l4_end <= target_l4i < 512,
        pt.spec_resolve_mapping_l4(target_l4i).is_Some(),
        pt.spec_resolve_mapping_l4(target_l4i).get_Some_0().addr == target_l3_p,
        forall|i: L3Index| #![auto] 0 <= i < 512 ==> pt.spec_resolve_mapping_l3(target_l4i, i).is_None(),
        forall|i: L3Index| #![auto] 0 <= i < 512 ==> pt.spec_resolve_mapping_1g_l3(target_l4i, i).is_None(),
    ensures
        pt.l2_tables@.dom().contains(target_l3_p) || pt.l1_tables@.dom().contains(target_l3_p),
{
}
reason: If target_l3_p also appears in L2/L1 table domains, removing it from L3 tables would corrupt lower-level page tables

name: all_other_l4_entries_empty
code:
proof fn phi_4_all_other_l4_entries_empty(pt: PageTable, target_l4i: L4Index, target_l3_p: PageMapPtr)
    requires
        pt.wf(),
        pt.kernel_l4_end <= target_l4i < 512,
        pt.spec_resolve_mapping_l4(target_l4i).is_Some(),
        pt.spec_resolve_mapping_l4(target_l4i).get_Some_0().addr == target_l3_p,
        forall|i: L3Index| #![auto] 0 <= i < 512 ==> pt.spec_resolve_mapping_l3(target_l4i, i).is_None(),
        forall|i: L3Index| #![auto] 0 <= i < 512 ==> pt.spec_resolve_mapping_1g_l3(target_l4i, i).is_None(),
    ensures
        forall|l4i: L4Index|
            #![auto]
            pt.kernel_l4_end <= l4i < 512 && l4i != target_l4i
                ==> !pt.l4_table@[pt.cr3].value()[l4i].perm.present,
{
}
reason: If the preconditions force all other user-space L4 entries to be non-present, the function is overly restricted to single-entry page tables

name: kernel_l4_end_forced_zero
code:
proof fn phi_5_kernel_l4_end_forced_zero(pt: PageTable, target_l4i: L4Index, target_l3_p: PageMapPtr)
    requires
        pt.wf(),
        pt.kernel_l4_end <= target_l4i < 512,
        pt.spec_resolve_mapping_l4(target_l4i).is_Some(),
        pt.spec_resolve_mapping_l4(target_l4i).get_Some_0().addr == target_l3_p,
        forall|i: L3Index| #![auto] 0 <= i < 512 ==> pt.spec_resolve_mapping_l3(target_l4i, i).is_None(),
        forall|i: L3Index| #![auto] 0 <= i < 512 ==> pt.spec_resolve_mapping_1g_l3(target_l4i, i).is_None(),
    ensures
        pt.kernel_l4_end == 0,
{
}
reason: If kernel_l4_end is forced to zero, all 512 L4 entries are user-space and kernel has no reserved entries, breaking kernel/user isolation
